pages.subtopic: RBI Monetary Policy and Economic Capital Framework
pages.rationale: This page provides a detailed overview of RBI's monetary policy instruments (quantitative and qualitative) and explains the Economic Capital Framework (ECF) and RBI's surplus transfer. It is highly dense with UPSC-relevant facts and concepts.

This page details components of the Economic Capital Framework, India's Forex Reserves (including reasons for increasing gold and associated risks), and the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021. It is highly dense with UPSC-relevant information.

This page elaborates on the RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme and introduces several important RBI initiatives and terms like Standing Deposit Facility, Variable Rate Reverse Repo, Switch Auction, and Co-lending norms. It is highly dense with UPSC-relevant information.

pages.subtopic: Payment Systems, RBI Advances, and Digital Initiatives
pages.rationale: This page covers co-lending norms, Payment Aggregators, Ways and Means Advances (WMA), and new RBI initiatives such as ULI, CBDC retail sandbox, and Tokenisation of Certificate of Deposits. It is packed with definitions, features, and regulatory aspects relevant for UPSC.
